narrative: USMCA Type 01 consumption entry, automotive seat-frame assembly from Mexico. ISF (10+2) filed 2026-04-12 at 14:30 UTC, vessel loaded 2026-04-14 at 02:00 UTC (35.5 hours pre-load) — all 10 elements complete + transmit confirmation in ABI. HTS classification 9401.90.5000 supported by GRI 1 + CROSS ruling N308422 + product specification with bill of materials. USMCA preference claim with Certification of Origin from producer; RVC calculation 78% net cost basis (above 75% threshold for auto parts under 2026 phase-in). Transaction-value appraisement; related-party but arm's-length verified by transfer-pricing study. CTPAT Tier-2 member; last validation 2024-08-15. Reasonable-care file includes broker advisement letter + product spec + 5-year ruling consistency check. UFLPA risk screen completed — supplier not on entity list; supplier traceability documentation through cotton-yarn tier.
